summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM - VIN Intelligence Platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with proper navigation, forms, and admin authentication.
passed_tests: Admin Login API (POST /api/auth/login) - 201 response with JWT token
Calculator Ports API (GET /api/calculator/ports) - Returns 4 ports and 4 vehicle types
Calculator Calculate API (POST /api/calculator/calculate) - Detailed cost breakdown with totals
Calculator Quote API (POST /api/calculator/quote) - Quote creation with ID and expiry
Lead Quick Create API (POST /api/public/leads/quick) - Lead creation successful
Lead from Quote API (POST /api/public/leads/from-quote) - Quote to lead conversion
Auth Me API (GET /api/auth/me) - User info retrieval with token
Home Page UI - Loads correctly, navigation functional, CTA button works
VIN Check Page UI - Form elements working, VIN input functional, search works
Admin Login Page UI - All form elements functional, login successful, admin panel access
